ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "gmt_time" TEXT /* GMT timestamp of the market data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the data */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price for the instrument */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price for the instrument */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Last trade price for the instrument */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., EUR/USD) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., Currency, Equity) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the instrument belongs */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for derivatives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's login name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "triggered_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, app notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, extended hours) */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume during the session */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price during the session */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the strategy */,
  "backtest_results" TEXT /* Backtest results for the strategy */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics (e.g., Sharpe ratio, drawdown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the instrument to trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which to execute the order */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Time when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the order (e.g., filled, partially filled, canceled) */,
  "filled_quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the order that has been filled */,
  "remaining_quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the order that remains to be filled */,
  "average_fill_price" REAL /* Average price at which the order was filled */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time when the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES trade_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument analyzed */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the analysis report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the analysis (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
